title: salvia pratensis var. sclareoides
intro: Salvia pratensis var. sclareoides, also known as Blue Sage, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. The health benefits of Blue Sage include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and promote better sleep. Blue Sage can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
